pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 for compilation and runtime.
Add Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency for reactive-style routing in MVC context.
Add spring-dotenv dependency to load environment variables from .env files.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation in tests.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing HTTP services in tests.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency, likely to resolve conflicts or ensure availability.
Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to use TCP for event transmission to fix test execution issues.
Configure Maven JAR plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.
Configure JaCoCo plugin with specific exclusions and coverage rules for code coverage reporting.
Configure Pitest plugin for mutation testing with specific target classes, tests, and exclusions.
Add a new Maven profile 'wiremock' to activate H2 database and specific properties when WIREMOCK env var is set.
Add a new Maven profile 'integration' to activate H2 database and frontend build steps when INTEGRATION env var is set.
Update the Node.js version used in the frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for better compatibility.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch base image from Maven JDK 11 to Liberica OpenJDK 21 Alpine to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven via apk since the base image no longer provides it.
Install bash via apk to support shell scripts in the build process.
Install libstdc++ via apk to satisfy native library dependencies.
Switch from NodeSource apt script to nvm for installing Node.js on Alpine.
Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer needed or compatible.
Add Maven build step to compile the application inside the Docker image.
Define the entrypoint to run the compiled JAR file instead of a generic bash shell.
Copy source code and configuration files into the image for the build step.
